title: microcos malayana
intro: Microcos malayana, also known as the Malay Tree or Malayan Madder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microcos malayana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound healer. Microcos malayana is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are typically made by boiling the roots or leaves in water to release its medicinal compounds.
